title: rochelia disperma subsp. retorta
intro: Rochelia disperma subsp. retorta, also known as the twisted rochelia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It is native to the Himalayas and is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for reducing inflammation and improving overall health. Rochelia disperma subsp. retorta can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and powder, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
